entities.name: CATTLE
entities.description: Bovine animals used for grazing in the Sahel region

entities.name: STEERS
entities.description: Intact male cattle used as subjects in the grazing trial

entities.name: WET SEASON
entities.description: The seasonal period during which grazing access is restricted

entities.name: SAHEL
entities.description: The semi-arid region in Africa where the study was conducted

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: The broader geographic region encompassing the southern Sahel

entities.name: GRAZING TRIAL
entities.description: An experimental study to evaluate the effects of grazing duration and method on cattle

entities.name: TETHERING
entities.description: A grazing method where animals are tied to a fixed point

entities.name: CLOSE HERDING
entities.description: A grazing method involving closely managed herding of animals

entities.name: GRAZING DURATION
entities.description: The amount of time per day cattle are allowed to graze

entities.name: CATTLE NUTRITION
entities.description: The nutritional status and intake of cattle

entities.name: CATTLE PERFORMANCE
entities.description: The growth and health outcomes of cattle

entities.name: DIET SELECTION
entities.description: The process by which cattle choose which forage to eat

entities.name: FAECAL OUTPUT
entities.description: The amount of waste excreted by the cattle

entities.name: FORAGE INTAKE
entities.description: The quantity of forage consumed by the cattle

entities.name: GRAZING BEHAVIOUR
entities.description: The patterns and habits of cattle while grazing

entities.name: WEIGHT CHANGES
entities.description: The fluctuations in body mass of the cattle

entities.name: ORGANIC MATTER DIGESTIBILITY
entities.description: The proportion of organic matter in the diet that is digested

entities.name: CRUDE PROTEIN
entities.description: The total protein content of the forage consumed

entities.name: INGESTION RATE
entities.description: The speed at which cattle consume forage

entities.name: AVERAGE DAILY GAIN
entities.description: The average weight increase of cattle per day
